query: DELETE FROM quick_messages WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM notifications WHERE userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM historico_presenca WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM resumo_presenca_diaria WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM push_subscriptions WHERE userId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste'); DELETE FROM disponibilidade_corretor WHERE corretorId IN (SELECT id FROM users WHERE name LIKE 'Corretor%Teste%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Rank%' OR name LIKE 'Corretor Batch%' OR name = 'Corretor 2' OR name LIKE 'João Silva Teste');
